chunks.text: Technical Reports - James O'Brien. The Unprecedented Risks and Opportunities of Extended Reality Motion Data (EECS-2023-232) Vivek Nair. Temporal IK: Data-Driven Pose Estimation for Virtual Reality (EECS-2019-59) James Lin. A Perceptually Based Model of Visual Adaptation (EECS-2014-204) Armin Samii and James O'Brien. A Fast Filter for Physically-Based Rendering (EECS-2013-118) Brandon Wang. Radiance Caching and Local Geometry Correction (CSD-04-1318) Okan Arikan, David A. Forsyth and James F. O'Brien.
chunks.question: What are the technical reports listed for James O'Brien?
chunks.answer: Five technical reports with authors and codes.
